rulings.Case Title: KATHLEEN NEEDHAM VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Post Bond On Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 24, 2017, line 2. PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN NEEDHAM's Notice Of Motion To Post Bond On Appeal DENIED. Notice of Motion indicates that the motion is based on CCP 917.4. This section is not applicable to the money judgment at issue in this case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GAIL Y IZAGUIRRE VS. RENKA PROP. LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 24, 2017, line 5. PLAINTIFF GAIL IZAGUIRRE Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; And Request For Sanctions GRANTED. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections. Date of compliance is contingent on the outcome of the Motion to be Relieved as Counsel and is to be determined at the hearing. Sanctions granted in the amount of $10,400. = (501/REQ)
